data.content: Implementation lives on branch worktree-foolery-54e9-live-plan-validation (commit 67a98229). The driver is scripts/test-plans-live.sh and scripts/test-plans-live.mjs. The shell script creates a disposable git worktree from /Users/cartine/stitch under .test-plans-live/<basename>, copies the source repo's .knots/ into it, picks (or accepts) beat ids, starts the dev server on FOOLERY_DEV_PORT (default 3327), and hands off to the Node validator with --base-url, --repo, --beats, and --dev-log. Caller-provided beat ids and worktree paths are honored via FOOLERY_PLAN_BEAT_IDS and FOOLERY_PLAN_WORKTREE; FOOLERY_PLAN_REPO selects the source. Cleanup preserves the disposable worktree on failure for forensic inspection.
